_comment: Template for adding athletes from a research run. Copy to data/incoming.json, fill in, then run `npm run add`. Only name, sport, position, team and valuation are required — everything else has sensible defaults. Add any NEW schools under 'teams' (existing schools can be omitted). 'slug', 'low' and 'high' are auto-generated if you leave them out. Re-importing an existing slug UPDATES that athlete.

athletes.name: Jane Doe
athletes.blurb: One-sentence description used on the athlete page.

athletes.name: John Smith
athletes.source: Estimate (On3 does not disclose exact figure)
